name: paperclips-companion
description: Interview-ready Paperclips AI companion demo with selected-window capture, VLM scene parsing, grounded advice, and sidecar UI.

scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.json && esbuild src/renderer/app.ts --bundle --format=iife --platform=browser --outfile=dist/renderer/app.js && node scripts/copy-renderer-assets.mjs
scripts.check: npm run test && npm run build && npm run eval
